questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '08816824-0efb-44ca-8d75-4a7440ebafd7' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '8ac4c7b9-7649-420a-ac37-19954dc7a45e'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '08816824-0efb-44ca-8d75-4a7440ebafd7'; delete from question_items where id = '08816824-0efb-44ca-8d75-4a7440ebafd7';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
